description: Enable the barcode auto-deletion feature in bcWebCam and set the timeout to 500 seconds. Currently, the 'Delete recognized Barcode after' checkbox is unchecked and the timeout value is 0, meaning recognized barcodes stay in the list indefinitely. For high-throughput scanning of product barcodes, enable this feature and set it to 500 seconds. Open bcWebCam's Options dialog (gear icon in the bottom toolbar), check the 'Delete recognized Barcode after' checkbox, set the value to 500 seconds, and click OK to apply.
